steps.title: Set up the percentage equation
steps.content:
36 is 36% of what number? translates to an equation where 36 equals 36% of the unknown number $x$:
$$36 = 0.36 \times x$$

steps.title: Solve for the unknown number
steps.content:
Divide both sides by 0.36 to isolate $x$:
$$x = \frac{36}{0.36}$$
Rewrite $0.36 = \frac{36}{100}$:
$$x = \frac{36}{\frac{36}{100}} = 36 \times \frac{100}{36} = 100$$
That confirms D is correct.
